PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-15-2014 Continued To Aug-05-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for petitioner.

Mr. Ferdon stated that he has proof of holographic will which he will file this morning. The petition for letters of administration with will annexed was continued to August 5, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
